### Start from an example - Basic

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/solid/getting-started.md

Commands to clone, install, and run the Basic example project.

```bash
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/solid/start-basic start-basic
cd start-basic
npm install
npm run dev
```

--------------------------------

### Start from an example - Clone a different example manually

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/solid/getting-started.md

Commands to clone, install, and run a different example project by replacing EXAMPLE_SLUG.

```bash
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/solid/EXAMPLE_SLUG my-new-project
cd my-new-project
npm install
npm run dev
```

--------------------------------

### Start from the Basic example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/getting-started.md

Commands to clone and run the Basic example project.

```bash
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/start-basic start-basic
cd start-basic
npm install
npm run dev
```

--------------------------------

### Start a new project

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/react/quickstart/README.md

Command to initialize a new project based on this quickstart example.

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/quickstart quickstart
```

--------------------------------

### Start a new project based on this example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/react/quickstart-file-based/README.md

Command to initialize a new project using this quickstart example.

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/quickstart-file-based quickstart-file-based
```

--------------------------------

### Setup environment variables

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/react/start-basic-authjs/README.md

Command to copy the example environment file for configuration.

```sh
cp .env.example .env
```

--------------------------------

### Verify Installation (Solid)

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/router/quick-start.md

Example package.json dependency entry for TanStack Solid Router.

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "@tanstack/solid-router": "^x.x.x"
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Clone a different example manually

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/getting-started.md

Commands to clone and run any official example by replacing EXAMPLE_SLUG.

```bash
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/EXAMPLE_SLUG my-new-project
cd my-new-project
npm install
npm run dev
```

--------------------------------

```sh

```

Command to initialize a new project using this example as a template.

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/start-basic start-basic
```

```sh

```

--------------------------------

### Run Example Commands

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/solid/large-file-based/README.md

Commands to install dependencies, generate routes, build the route tree, and type check the example.

```shell
pnpm install
```

```shell
pnpm gen
```

```shell
pnpm build
```

```shell
pnpm test:types
```

--------------------------------

```sh

```

### Start a new project based on this example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/react/quickstart-webpack-file-based/README.md

```sh

```

--------------------------------

### Project Setup Commands

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/solid/start-convex-better-auth/README.md

Commands to install dependencies, configure environment variables, and start the Convex and development servers.

```shell
pnpm i
pnpx convex dev
pnpx convex env set SITE_URL http://localhost:3000/
pnpx convex env set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=$(openssl rand -base64 32)
pnpx convex dev
pnpm run dev
```

--------------------------------

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/start-streaming-data-from-server-functions start-streaming-data-from-server-functions
```

--------------------------------

### Recommended Flat Config setup

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/eslint/eslint-plugin-start.md

Example of how to enable all recommended ESLint rules using the flat config format (eslint.config.js).

```js
// eslint.config.js
import pluginStart from '@tanstack/eslint-plugin-start'

export default [
  pluginStart.configs['flat/recommended'],
  // Any other config...
]
```

--------------------------------

### Run the example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/e2e/react-router/scroll-restoration-sandbox-vite/README.md

Commands to install dependencies and start the development server.

```bash
npm install
```

```bash
npm start
```

--------------------------------

### Recommended Legacy Config setup

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/eslint/eslint-plugin-start.md

Example of how to enable all recommended ESLint rules using the legacy config format (.eslintrc).

```json
{
  "extends": ["plugin:@tanstack/eslint-plugin-start/recommended"]
}
```

--------------------------------

```bash
pnpm i
pnpm dev
```

### Install TanStack Router

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/router/quick-start.md

Package names for installing TanStack Router in an existing project.

```text
@tanstack/react-router
```

```text
@tanstack/solid-router
```

```bash
npx @tanstack/cli@latest create
```


--------------------------------

### Cookie Management

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/start-server-core/skills/start-server-core/SKILL.md

Example of using functions to get, set, and delete cookies within a server function.

```typescript
// Use @tanstack/<framework>-start for your framework (react, solid, vue)
import { createServerFn } from '@tanstack/react-start'
import {
  getCookies,
  getCookie,
  setCookie,
  deleteCookie,
} from '@tanstack/react-start/server'

const serverFn = createServerFn({ method: 'POST' }).handler(async () => {
  const allCookies = getCookies()
  const token = getCookie('session-token')

  setCookie('preference', 'dark', {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: true,
    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30, // 30 days
    path: '/',
  })

  deleteCookie('old-cookie')
})
```

--------------------------------

### Custom Legacy Config setup

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/eslint/eslint-plugin-start.md

Example of how to load the plugin and configure specific rules using the legacy config format (.eslintrc).

```json
{
  "plugins": ["@tanstack/eslint-plugin-start"],
  "rules": {
    "@tanstack/start/no-client-code-in-server-component": "error",
    "@tanstack/start/no-async-client-component": "error"
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Custom Flat Config setup

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/eslint/eslint-plugin-start.md

Example of how to load the plugin and configure specific rules using the flat config format (eslint.config.js).

```js
// eslint.config.js
import pluginStart from '@tanstack/eslint-plugin-start'

export default [
  {
    plugins: {
      '@tanstack/start': pluginStart
    },
    rules: {
      '@tanstack/start/no-client-code-in-server-component': 'error',
      '@tanstack/start/no-async-client-component': 'error'
    }
  },
  // Any other config...
]
```

--------------------------------

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/kitchen-sink-react-query kitchen-sink-react-query
```

### Install TanStack Start

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/react-start/skills/lifecycle/migrate-from-nextjs/SKILL.md

Commands to install necessary TanStack Start and Vite packages.

```bash
npm i @tanstack/react-start @tanstack/react-router
npm i -D vite @vitejs/plugin-react
```

```bash
npx @tanstack/cli@latest create --framework solid
```

### Start application

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/guide/hosting.md

Command to start the application.

```sh
npm run start
```

--------------------------------

### Install Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/vue-start/skills/vue-start/SKILL.md

Install necessary dependencies for a TanStack Start Vue project.

```bash
npm i @tanstack/vue-start @tanstack/vue-router vue
npm i -D vite @vitejs/plugin-vue @vitejs/plugin-vue-jsx typescript
```

--------------------------------

### Install Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/start-client-core/skills/start-core/SKILL.md

Install the necessary TanStack Start, React, and Vite dependencies.

```bash
npm i @tanstack/react-start @tanstack/react-router react react-dom
npm i -D vite @vitejs/plugin-react typescript
```

--------------------------------

### Install Core Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/build-from-scratch.md

Install @tanstack/react-start and @tanstack/react-router.

```shell
npm i @tanstack/react-start @tanstack/react-router
```

--------------------------------

### Install React Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/build-from-scratch.md

Install React and React DOM.

```shell
npm i react react-dom
```

--------------------------------

### Install Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/solid-start/skills/solid-start/SKILL.md

Install necessary npm packages for a TanStack Start project with Solid.

```bash
npm i @tanstack/solid-start @tanstack/solid-router solid-js
npm i -D vite vite-plugin-solid typescript
```

--------------------------------

### Install Dependencies

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/react-start/skills/react-start/SKILL.md

Commands to install necessary npm packages for a TanStack Start React project.

```bash
npm i @tanstack/react-start @tanstack/react-router react react-dom
npm i -D vite @vitejs/plugin-react typescript @types/react @types/react-dom
```

--------------------------------

### TanStack Start Middleware Example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/comparison.md

An example of a composable middleware in TanStack Start, demonstrating client-side and server-side execution.

```tsx
const authMiddleware = createMiddleware({ type: 'function' })
  .client(async ({ next }) => {
    // Run auth checks on client
    return next({
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${getToken()}` }
    })
  })
  .server(async ({ next }) => {
    // Validate auth on server
    return next({ context: { user: await getUser() } })
  })
```

--------------------------------

### Install Auth0

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/router/how-to/setup-auth-providers.md

Install the Auth0 React SDK.

```bash
npm install @auth0/auth0-react
```

--------------------------------

### Advanced configuration examples

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/guide/hosting.md

Examples demonstrating advanced environment variable configurations for memory usage, asset preloading, and Gzip.

```sh
# Optimize for minimal memory usage
ASSET_PRELOAD_MAX_SIZE=1048576 bun run server.ts

# Preload only critical assets
ASSET_PRELOAD_INCLUDE_PATTERNS="*.js,*.css" \
ASSET_PRELOAD_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS="*.map,vendor-*" \
bun run server.ts

# Disable optional features
ASSET_PRELOAD_ENABLE_ETAG=false \
ASSET_PRELOAD_ENABLE_GZIP=false \
bun run server.ts

# Custom Gzip configuration
ASSET_PRELOAD_GZIP_MIN_SIZE=2048 \
ASSET_PRELOAD_GZIP_MIME_TYPES="text/,application/javascript,application/json" \
bun run server.ts
```

--------------------------------

### Verify installation

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/router/how-to/install.md

Example of how the installed package appears in your package.json dependencies.

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "@tanstack/react-router": "^x.x.x"
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Start a new project

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/examples/react/start-workos/README.md

Command to start a new project based on this example.

```sh
npx gitpick TanStack/router/tree/main/examples/react/start-workos start-workos
```

--------------------------------

### Initialize Project Directory

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/build-from-scratch.md

Create a new project directory and initialize it using npm.

```shell
mkdir myApp
cd myApp
npm init -y
```

--------------------------------

### Quick Start Example

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/solid/guide/code-execution-patterns.md

Demonstrates how to set up execution boundaries using `createServerFn`, `createServerOnlyFn`, `createClientOnlyFn`, and `createIsomorphicFn`.

```tsx
import {
  createServerFn,
  createServerOnlyFn,
  createClientOnlyFn,
  createIsomorphicFn,
} from '@tanstack/solid-start'

// Server function (RPC call)
const getUsers = createServerFn().handler(async () => {
  return await db.users.findMany()
})

// Server-only utility (crashes on client)
const getSecret = createServerOnlyFn(() => process.env.API_SECRET)

// Client-only utility (crashes on server)
const saveToStorage = createClientOnlyFn((data: any) => {
  localStorage.setItem('data', JSON.stringify(data))
})

// Different implementations per environment
const logger = createIsomorphicFn()
  .server((msg) => console.log(`[SERVER]: ${msg}`))
  .client((msg) => console.log(`[CLIENT]: ${msg}`))
```

--------------------------------

### Convert Middleware (TanStack Start)

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/packages/react-start/skills/lifecycle/migrate-from-nextjs/SKILL.md

Example of middleware in TanStack Start.

```tsx
// src/start.ts ", must be manually created
import { createStart, createMiddleware } from '@tanstack/react-start'
import { redirect } from '@tanstack/react-router'

const authMiddleware = createMiddleware().server(async ({ next, request }) => {
  const cookie = request.headers.get('cookie')
  if (!cookie?.includes('session=')) {
    throw redirect({ to: '/login' })
  }
  return next()
})

export const startInstance = createStart(() => ({
  requestMiddleware: [authMiddleware],
}))
```

--------------------------------

### Common configurations examples

Source: https://github.com/tanstack/router/blob/main/docs/start/framework/react/guide/hosting.md

Examples of setting common environment variables for the server.

```sh
PORT=8080 bun run server.ts  # Custom port
ASSET_PRELOAD_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true bun run server.ts  # See what's happening
```
